transcript: Hair tips from a Korean barber. This is how you get three-dimensional hair using bangs on both men and women. Firstly, starting off with flat hair, you want to use rollers in the middle part of your hair. Here you'll be able to add volume as well as texture. Then use a blow dryer to just soften up the entire look. Get a small brush to find out the tiny little lines and details that you want to emphasize. Lastly, you want to use a hairspray while you stick up the hair. This will help hold the hair in place and give it a nice three-dimensional look. That's how you create 3D Be here on a simple day.
